commands.review_summary:
This PR adds memory-core SQLite file-identity detection for cached managers, pending dirty-state cleanup after replacement, stale temp-family cleanup on DB open, and regression tests for status-first and search-first CLI reindex recovery.

PR surface: Source +136, Tests +81. Total +217 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for a source-level path: the linked reports reproduce the shipped stale-handle/missing-identity failure, and current main has separate cached default managers plus CLI atomic index replacement. I did not run a live gateway reproduction in this read-only review.
